exploration_notes: The task involves aligning two boolean clause limits. (1) `openlibrary/core/bookshelves.py:20` defines `FILTER_BOOK_LIMIT: Final = 30_000`, which caps how many work IDs from the reading log are sent as a boolean OR query to Solr. (2) `compose.yaml:55` sets `-Dsolr.max.booleanClauses=30000` in `SOLR_OPTS` for the Solr service. Both values are currently 30,000 and already aligned.
